blocks.title: 📘 PAST CONTINUOUS vs PAST SIMPLE
blocks.intro: Para contar historias usamos los dos: el past continuous (was/were + -ing) pinta la escena de fondo, y el past simple cuenta las acciones que pasaron. Repasa y luego practica.

cells.body:
I / he / she was working
you / we / they were working
was/were + verbo-ing

I was watching a film (fondo, en progreso)
when my phone rang. (acción corta)

While + continuo: While I was checking…
When + simple: When the server crashed…

As soon as = en cuanto:
As soon as we fixed it, the site came back.

Evento terminado = past simple:
The server crashed at eleven.
The server was crashing at eleven.

blocks.ladderLabel: Secuenciadores — ordenan tu historia y suenan naturales:
blocks.note: Cómo funciona: esta lección mezcla ordenar 🧩, escucha 🎧, completar 📝 y memory 🧠. Hacé el ✓ CHECK en cada ejercicio.

blocks.title: ★ THE NIGHT EVERYTHING CRASHED
blocks.intro: El viernes lanzaron el sitio de GreenMarket… y a las once de la noche todo se cayó. El lunes, Priya quiere saber qué pasó. Marcos cuenta su versión de la historia — y después Sofia cuenta la suya. ¿Dicen lo mismo? 👀

cast.sp: cuenta su versión
cuenta la suya
quiere la historia completa

blocks.title: ORDENÁ LA HISTORIA
blocks.intro: Toca las palabras para reconstruir las frases de la noche del lanzamiento.

items.answer: I was watching a film when my phone rang
While I was checking the logs I found the problem

blocks.title: AUDIO 1 · MARCOS'S VERSION
blocks.desc: Priya le pregunta a Marcos qué pasó la noche del lanzamiento. Escucha su versión.
blocks.speakers: 🗣 Priya + Marcos

questions.q: What was Marcos doing when his phone rang?
What did he find while he was checking the logs?
options: The payment system was sending too many requests

questions.q: According to Marcos, the site was down for about one hour.

speaking.prompt: Retell Marcos's story in 3–4 sentences. Use was/were + -ing for the background and past simple for the actions.
speaking.starter: He was watching a film when his phone rang. While he was checking the logs, he…

transcript.html: Marcos, I read the report about Friday night. Tell me — what happened?
Well, it was about eleven o'clock. I was watching a film at home when my phone rang. It was Sofia — the website was down.
The night of the launch! What did you do?
I logged on immediately. While I was checking the logs, I found the problem: the payment system was sending too many requests, and the server crashed.
And how did you fix it?

I restarted the payment service. As soon as we fixed it, the site came back. It was down for about an hour. In the end, the client never noticed — David called on Saturday just to say congratulations!
Good work. But let's make sure it never happens again.

blocks.title: CONTINUO o SIMPLE
blocks.intro: Elige la forma correcta. Piensa: ¿escena de fondo (was/were + -ing) o acción que pasó (past simple)?

items.q: I ___ a film when my phone rang.
While I was checking the logs, I ___ the problem.
We ___ still testing when the sun came up.
___ soon as we fixed it, the site came back.
Sofia ___ working late when the alert arrived.

blocks.title: MEMORY · verbo y pasado
blocks.intro: Encuentra cada verbo con su past simple irregular. Toca dos cartas.

blocks.title: AUDIO 2 · SOFIA'S VERSION
blocks.desc: Ahora Sofia cuenta SU versión de esa noche… y no coincide del todo con la de Marcos. 👀 ¿Qué cambia?

questions.q: According to Sofia, who saw the problem first?
How long does Sofia say the site was down?
Sofia's story is exactly the same as Marcos's story.

speaking.prompt: What are TWO differences between Sofia's version and Marcos's version?
speaking.starter: Marcos said the site was down for one hour, but Sofia says… And according to Sofia, she…

transcript.html: So, Marcos told you about launch night? Ha! Let me tell you what really happened. I was working late that Friday — I was writing the launch report when an alert appeared on my screen. The website was down! I saw the problem first, not Marcos — he says he found it, but I was already looking at the logs when I called him! And one more thing: it wasn't down for one hour. It was down for almost two hours. I know, because I was watching the clock the whole time. But okay, I'll be fair: as soon as he logged on, he worked really fast. In the end, we fixed it together. That's the true story!

blocks.title: ✍️ MY 'EVERYTHING WENT WRONG' STORY
blocks.intro: Cuenta una historia real (o inventada) de un día en que algo salió mal — en el trabajo, un viaje, un examen… (6–8 frases):
checklist: Empezá con la escena de fondo: I was …ing (I was working late / I was travelling…)
La acción que interrumpe en past simple: …when my phone rang
Usá 2 secuenciadores (Suddenly / As soon as / In the end…)
Cerrá con cómo terminó todo (In the end,…)
blocks.placeholder: It was a normal Friday. I was…
blocks.example: It was a normal Friday. I was working from home, and everything was quiet. Suddenly, my computer stopped working — five minutes before an important meeting! While I was restarting it, I called my colleague from my phone. She started the meeting without me. As soon as my computer came back, I joined the call. In the end, nobody noticed the problem, but my heart was still racing!
blocks.hw: Escribe tu historia y grábate contándola en voz alta (¡sin leer, si puedes!). Envíame el texto y el audio por WhatsApp y lo corregimos.
